arts.sum: Barcelona have made contact with Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran over a potential move to the Spanish side. Duran has hit the headlines during the opening weeks of the Premier League season after scoring four goals in just five appearances for Aston Villa. The Colombian’s return includes three match-winners and has come entirely as a […] The post Barcelona ‘make contact’ with in-form forward first appeared on The Football Faithful.

Barcelona President Joan Laporta to meet with La Liga President Javier Tebas to discuss salary limit situation - Football España The first team player Marc ter Stegen has undergone a successful surgical intervention on the patella tendon injury in his right knee by Dr. Joan Carles Monllau under the supervision of the Club’s Medical Services at Barcelona Hospital.

arts.ttl: Villarreal 1-5 Barcelona: Player ratings as Catalan giants record huge victory on the road
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal came close to earning the first goal of the game, firing a beautiful shot towards the top left corner before it bounced off the post. The Spanish midfielder disguised his assist to slide the ball towards Lewandowski, who took full advantage of Diego Conde's position away from goal to put his side 1-0 ahead.

arts.ttl: Barça need more Flick magic in light of Ter Stegen injury
arts.sum: Hansi Flick has been a magician in Barca's perfect start to 2024-25. He'll need to keep it up after Marc-Andre ter Stegen ruptured his patellar tendon.

arts.ttl: Developments in Barcelona spell trouble for Arne Slot and Liverpool
arts.sum: Arne Slot has enjoyed a decent start to his life as Liverpool manager, especially considering the pressure he would’ve felt being the first in the door after Jurgen Klopp. Rather than making a big song and dance about things, he has been calmness personified, and just gone about his business with seriousness and intent. Aside […] The post Developments in Barcelona spell trouble for Arne Slot and Liverpool appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: La Liga rivals joins Barca stars in sending support to Ter Stegen
arts.sum: Another former team-mate, Ilkay Gundogan, has also taken time out to post a message to Ter Stegen: “I feel so sorry for you. Raphinha dedicated Barcelona’s win to Ter Stegen after the match when he spoke to the media, and team-mates have been quick to post messages on social media to their goalkeeper.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Eye PSG’s Gold Medalist for Potential Reunion After Ter Stegen Injury, Report Says
arts.sum: FC Barcelona goalkeeper Marc-André ter Stegen suffered a full rupture of the patella tendon in his right knee during Sunday’s 5-1 win over Villarreal in LaLiga. According to ESPN, the German shot-stopper is expected to be out for months and will likely miss the rest of the season. In response, Barcelona’s leadership is set to […] The post Barcelona Eye PSG’s Gold Medalist for Potential Reunion After Ter Stegen Injury, Report Says appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Retired former Barcelona goalkeeper offers to cover injured Marc-Andre ter Stegen
arts.sum: Almost immediately after Ter Stegen's injury, various reports stated that Barcelona could look to sign a replacement for the German. Bravo, a 150-cap Chile international who is now 41, retired this summer after a four-season spell with Real Betis, but he has confirmed he would be prepared to come out of retirement if Barcelona make the call.

arts.ttl: Barca told Ter Stegen could ‘take a year to recover’ from knee injury
arts.sum: Dr Roberto Seijas, who is part of Ramon Cugat’s team, has spoken to RAC1 and explained the difference between his previous knee injury and why it may take a long time to recover. “Ter Stegen could take up to a year to recover,” he said.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs. Getafe: Head-to-head record and past meetings
arts.sum: Ahead of Wednesday's La Liga clash between Barcelona and Getafe, Sports Mole looks at the head-to-head record and previous meetings between the two clubs.
